summary_en: 100.0M shares (3.6% of S/O) | Y150.0B upper limit | ToSTNeT-3 and open-market execution | May 18, 2026 to Mar 31, 2027 | to enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency under 'JP Plan 2028' medium-term strategy | execution subject to market conditions.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock (acquisition of treasury stock based on company rules under Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Japan Post Holdings resolved on May 15, 2026 to acquire up to 100 million ordinary shares (3.6% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate purchase price of Y150 billion. The acquisition will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 (off-exchange matched trades on Tokyo Stock Exchange) and open-market purchases between May 18, 2026 and March 31, 2027. The company stated that the repurchase is intended to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency in line with the "JP Plan 2028" medium-term management strategy. Execution is subject to market conditions; the entire acquisition may be suspended or partially executed depending on market movements.
